questions.q: What percentage of VOI tokens are allocated to the community?
questions.fact: VOI allocates 75% of all tokens to the community — one of the highest community allocations in blockchain history, ensuring true decentralized ownership.

questions.q: What type of consensus mechanism does the Voi blockchain use?
questions.fact: Voi uses Proof of Stake, where nodes with more staked tokens have a higher chance of being selected to propose blocks — energy efficient and secure.

questions.q: How are accounts selected to propose blocks in Voi's consensus?
questions.fact: Every node runs a pseudorandom function on each staked account. Accounts with more tokens have higher probability of selection — fair yet stake-weighted.

questions.q: Voi's economic architecture is planned to span how many years?
questions.fact: VOI's tokenomics are designed over 20 years to strategically mitigate inflation and protect long-term stakeholders and community members.

questions.q: What blockchain technology does Voi leverage for its consensus mechanism?
questions.fact: Voi is built on Algorand's consensus technology, known for its Pure Proof of Stake design with security, scalability, and true decentralization.

questions.q: What is Voi's approximate transaction throughput (TPS)?
questions.fact: Voi features over 10,000 TPS with 2.8-second block times, making it highly performant for real-world DeFi, NFT, and gaming applications.

questions.q: What is Voi's approximate block time?
questions.fact: Voi's 2.8-second block time enables near-instant transaction finality — critical for user-facing applications where speed matters.

questions.q: How much of Voi's total token supply was raised through private investors to launch?
questions.fact: Voi only leveraged 1.73% of total token supply through private investors — a record-low that preserves community ownership and avoids VC dominance.

questions.q: What governs Voi's ecosystem direction and investments?
opts: The Voi Council, elected by token holders
questions.fact: Voi's Council is elected by token holders, ensuring those who contribute to the ecosystem directly shape its direction — democratic blockchain governance.

questions.q: Over the first five years, what portion of tokens are dedicated to ecosystem and future growth?
questions.fact: 50% of VOI tokens over five years are dedicated to nurturing the ecosystem — funding developer grants, community initiatives, and infrastructure growth.

questions.q: Which VC firms back Voi Network?
questions.fact: Arrington Capital and Sonic Boom back Voi, believing in its community-first vision — but their stake is kept minimal at just 1.73% of total supply.

questions.q: What web3 infrastructure partner did Voi join forces with for digital identity?
questions.fact: Voi partnered with Galxe for modular AI, digital identity management, and seamless Web3 experiences — key infrastructure for broad adoption.

questions.q: What does 'Layer 1 blockchain' mean in the context of Voi?
opts: A blockchain built on top of Ethereum
The base-level blockchain handling its own consensus and security
questions.fact: A Layer 1 handles its own consensus, security, and settlement natively — Voi is fully sovereign and doesn't rely on any other chain for security.

questions.q: How many steps are required to write a single block to the Voi blockchain in one round?
questions.fact: Three steps: block proposal, soft vote, and certify vote. Each involves different randomly selected accounts, ensuring decentralized validation.

questions.q: What is the primary mission of the Voi Network?
opts: To be a blockchain truly owned, run, and built by its community
To compete directly with Ethereum on gas fees
questions.fact: Voi's core mission: 'Built by You, Run by You, Owned by You' — placing community ownership at the center of every design decision.

questions.q: In Voi's tokenomics, what are 'early incentives' designed to do?
opts: Front-load rewards to kickstart network growth within the first 18 months
questions.fact: Early incentives are fully allocated within the first 18 months to bootstrap network participation, validator nodes, and developer activity.

questions.q: Which platform hosted Voi's Incentivized Testnet?
questions.fact: CoinList hosted Voi's Incentivized Testnet, rewarding participants for stress-testing the network and contributing to its early development.

questions.q: What does decentralized governance mean for a Voi token holder?
opts: You can vote on network direction, investments, and future changes
You can mine new tokens freely
questions.fact: Voi token holders elect the Council and submit proposals that directly shape the network's evolution — real on-chain power for real participants.

questions.q: Approximately how many community-driven projects had launched on Voi at its early stage?
questions.fact: Voi launched over 25 community-driven projects early on — spanning DeFi, NFTs, gaming, and tooling — all built by the community, for the community.

questions.q: What is the key benefit of Voi's conservative fundraising approach for the community?
opts: Majority of network value stays in community hands, not VCs
questions.fact: By limiting private investment to 1.73%, Voi ensures the community retains true governance power — VCs can't outvote or dump tokens on regular holders.

questions.q: How can anyone in the Voi ecosystem receive tokens for contributing value?
opts: By submitting proposals that are approved via community governance
By purchasing them on exchanges only
questions.fact: Anyone can submit a proposal to the community. If approved, they receive tokens for delivering value — making Voi a truly permissionless contributor economy.

questions.q: In Voi's consensus, what does a node propagate alongside a proposed block?
opts: Proof that the pseudorandom function selected that account
A digital signature from all validators
A hash of the previous 10 blocks
questions.fact: Nodes propagate the proposed block plus cryptographic proof (the PRF output) that their account was legitimately selected — preventing fraud.

questions.q: What describes Voi's approach to blockchain development philosophy?
opts: Community-driven innovation with real-world utility focus
questions.fact: Voi prioritizes community-driven innovation — resources flow to contributors who add real value, ensuring organic growth over top-down corporate decisions.

questions.q: What does Voi's partnership with Galxe specifically enable for users?
opts: Digital credentials and identity management for Web3
questions.fact: Galxe enables robust digital credentials and identity management on Voi — letting users build verifiable on-chain reputations and credentials.

questions.q: What mechanism prevents Voi's early investors from immediately selling their tokens?
opts: A structured vesting period for investor token allocations
Community vote required for each transfer
questions.fact: Private, pre-seed, and seed investors receive tokens through structured vesting periods — aligning their incentives with long-term network success.
